message:
feat(web/wizard): improve wizard validation, navigation, and step UX

Layout (layout.tsx):
- Clear validation errors on route change via useEffect on pathname
- Add bonus route detection (windows-terminal-setup) to hide shared
  step chrome when not applicable
- Track which steps use page-level navigation (steps 5, 12, bonus)
  to conditionally render prev/next buttons
- Memoize currentStep from currentSlug to avoid redundant computation

Step validation (wizardSteps.ts, useStepValidation.ts):
- Add command-completion-based validation: validateStatusCheck() requires
  the flywheel-doctor command to be marked complete before advancing
- Introduce isCommandMarkedComplete() helper that checks both localStorage
  persistence keys and DOM checkbox state for robustness
- Import safeGetItem from utils for localStorage access
- Wire validateStatusCheck into WIZARD_STEPS step 12 (Status Check)

Individual step pages:
- os-selection: improve OS detection and selection flow
- preflight-check: enhance preflight validation feedback
- ssh-connect, verify-key-connection: better SSH workflow guidance
- run-installer, reconnect-ubuntu: clearer installer progress
- status-check: add doctor command completion gate
- launch-onboarding: polish final step presentation
- windows-terminal-setup: update terminal setup instructions

HelpPanel: update contextual help content for wizard steps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
